ConnectionPasswordEncryption.^description: {$COUNT} Glue data catalog(s) do not have connection password encryption enabled
ConnectionPasswordEncryption.shortDesc: Enable connection password encryption for Glue data catalogs

MetadataEncryption.^description: {$COUNT} Glue data catalog(s) do not have metadata encryption enabled
MetadataEncryption.shortDesc: Enable metadata encryption for Glue data catalogs

PublicAccessibility.^description: {$COUNT} Glue data catalog(s) are publicly accessible
PublicAccessibility.shortDesc: Ensure Glue data catalogs are not publicly accessible

SslEnabled.^description: {$COUNT} Glue database connection(s) do not have SSL enabled
SslEnabled.shortDesc: Enable SSL for Glue database connections
ref: [Connecting to a JDBC Data Store in a VPC]<https://docs.aws.amazon.com/glue/latest/dg/connection-using.html>

DevEndpointCloudWatchLogsEncryption.^description: {$COUNT} Glue development endpoint(s) do not have CloudWatch logs encryption enabled
DevEndpointCloudWatchLogsEncryption.shortDesc: Enable CloudWatch logs encryption for Glue development endpoints

DevEndpointBookmarkEncryption.^description: {$COUNT} Glue development endpoint(s) do not have job bookmark encryption enabled
DevEndpointBookmarkEncryption.shortDesc: Enable job bookmark encryption for Glue development endpoints

DevEndpointS3Encryption.^description: {$COUNT} Glue development endpoint(s) do not have S3 encryption enabled
DevEndpointS3Encryption.shortDesc: Enable S3 encryption for Glue development endpoints

JobS3Encryption.^description: {$COUNT} Glue ETL job(s) do not have S3 encryption enabled
JobS3Encryption.shortDesc: Enable S3 encryption for Glue ETL jobs
ref: [Encrypting Data Written by Crawlers, Jobs, and Development Endpoints]<https://docs.aws.amazon.com/glue/latest/dg/encryption-security-configuration.html>

JobCloudWatchLogsEncryption.^description: {$COUNT} Glue ETL job(s) do not have CloudWatch logs encryption enabled
JobCloudWatchLogsEncryption.shortDesc: Enable CloudWatch logs encryption for Glue ETL jobs
ref: [Encrypting Data Written by Crawlers, Jobs, and Development Endpoints]<https://docs.aws.amazon.com/glue/latest/dg/encryption-security-configuration.html>

JobBookmarkEncryption.^description: {$COUNT} Glue ETL job(s) do not have job bookmark encryption enabled
JobBookmarkEncryption.shortDesc: Enable job bookmark encryption for Glue ETL jobs
ref: [Encrypting Data Written by Crawlers, Jobs, and Development Endpoints]<https://docs.aws.amazon.com/glue/latest/dg/encryption-security-configuration.html>

JobLoggingEnabled.^description: {$COUNT} Glue ETL job(s) do not have logging enabled
JobLoggingEnabled.shortDesc: Enable logging for Glue ETL jobs

MLTransformEncryptionAtRest.^description: {$COUNT} Glue ML transform(s) do not have encryption at rest enabled
MLTransformEncryptionAtRest.shortDesc: Enable encryption at rest for Glue ML transforms

JobBookmarkEnabled.^description: {$COUNT} Glue ETL job(s) do not have job bookmarks enabled. Job bookmarks help track processed data and prevent duplicate processing
JobBookmarkEnabled.shortDesc: Enable job bookmarks for Glue ETL jobs

GlueVersionCurrent.^description: {$COUNT} Glue ETL job(s) are using deprecated or old Glue versions. Consider upgrading to the latest version for performance improvements and new features
GlueVersionCurrent.shortDesc: Use latest Glue version for ETL jobs

CrawlerScheduleConfigured.^description: {$COUNT} Glue crawler(s) do not have a schedule configured. Crawlers without schedules may not run regularly to keep the Data Catalog up-to-date
